---
name: Good first issue proposal
about: Propose or define a small contributor-ready task
title: "[Good First Issue]: "
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the clear outcome of this task.

## Suggested Location

List the file or focused project area where the change should be made.

## What to Change

Describe the expected small, reviewable change.

## Out of Scope

List behavior, files, refactoring, or dependencies that should not be changed.

## Done When

- [ ] The requested change is complete.
- [ ] Relevant documentation or tests are updated where applicable.
- [ ] Relevant checks pass where applicable.
- [ ] The pull request contains no unrelated changes.
